d3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【一场有关梦境的实验。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"十三区高校的风纪委员风见一宵，自愿接受梦境实验项目。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"确保在对自身不构成任何伤害的前提下配合实验的所有流程，并允许实验人员记录过程中的数据。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在本次实验开始前，风见一宵已经在仪器的帮助下进入了稳定的睡眠状态，各项身体指标正常，未见异常提醒。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了避免造成实验者的意识混乱，梦境中的风见一宵被标记为「酣梦一宵」，除此之外，她的样貌也产生了一些变化。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"作为此次梦境实验的观察员，即将开启接下来的记录……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——缬草的梦境实验笔记·节选"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【瞩目之星，竟然是她？】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据心理测评结果显示，风见一宵的心理状态整体趋向健康，但依然存在着属于她这个年龄的困扰。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"比如轻度的自卑，轻度的焦虑……这些情况均来源于她自极度严苛、一丝不苟的「好学生」性格。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"风见一宵的梦境同她本人一样古板，哪怕是在梦里，她也依旧要担任风纪委员。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但略有不同的是，她不再是人群中被孤立的那个少女，而是校园中璀璨耀眼的「瞩目之星」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她变得活泼、自信、讨人喜欢，那个活在他人仰慕中的月夜见和她成为了朋友。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"根据实验前的相关信息评估，这是她一直梦想着的理想状态。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不知道我是否受到了梦境的影响，截止记录到现在为止，我认为她的确应该成为现在的样子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——缬草的梦境实验笔记·节选"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【长梦总会醒。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在进入梦境之前，我们曾约定用一样物品作为终止实验的信号，在进行了一番讨论后，我拿到了一张被判零分的考卷。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"出于对被实验者的尊重，该考卷不会作为公开的资料用以查阅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在我打算终止实验，脱离梦境时，风见一宵却消失了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我花费了一点精力才找到她——她独自一人站在十三区高校的露台上，悲伤地看向远处。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她看到我后，问我这一切是不是只是一场梦。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我说是的，但这并非只是梦，而是一次出于她个人意愿的，针对自我性格的引导实验。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我很少同被实验者有心灵上的共情，我承认那一刻我的确被她的悲伤所感染，但还是坚定拿出了那张考卷作为约定终止的信号。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"无论如何，我要对这场实验负责，而不是将其视为一个单纯的研究工具。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"况且，从结果来看，这次实验完成地十分圆满：风见一宵正在向着她理想的自己前行，或许很快就能真正成为她所渴盼的样子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我由衷期待着那一天的到来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——缬草的梦境实验笔记·节选"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.b27867f2c45498","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3命中效果 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大招cd非常快，多琪本中实现多轮控制非常好用，同时睡眠的增伤也能让通关多琪本速度加快。pvp中1技能2回合睡眠，配合梨梨，让对面一直睡觉，非常推荐拉满"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.4ebf05bd6d6a68","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+奋进+6讯光天击"}]}]}},{"key":"0.0c9f60d5f986c","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/269067.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"ui2SDg1x6YzVBz4d","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}],"data":[]}]
